perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with long dark hair wearing a light blue top and a young man in a beige t-shirt are sitting on a beige couch; the man's face is obscured by a blur filter. The woman is smiling widely and talking excitedly towards the camera. (2) They both raise their hands to show their fingers, indicating the lack of rings, while the woman makes expressive facial gestures ranging from surprise to laughter. (3) The woman uses her hands to frame the man's head and later rests her chin on her hands while smiling softly towards the lens as the scene cuts between different talking segments.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, medium-tempo acoustic guitar music starts immediately. A high-pitched, energetic female voice begins speaking in a mix of Mandarin and Korean. (2) The music continues as a consistent background layer while the female voice remains dominant; a male voice is heard chuckling and providing brief responses in a steady tone. (3) Occasional 'pop' and 'bling' sound effects are synchronized with visual text transitions. The audio ends with the music and female vocal fading out.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: '璟價要結婚啦 ep.0' - The title of the episode announcing the marriage. (2) Decorative Text: '結婚了' with bride and groom emojis - Highlighting the announcement with an excited tone. (3) Functional Text: '戒指嗎？' - Questioning the presence of rings. (4) Decorative Text: 'J人', 'P人' - Labeling personality types during the discussion. (5) Functional Text: '冬瓜CP的婚禮準備會順利嗎？' - A hook asking if the 'Winter Melon CP' wedding prep will go smoothly.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: The video follows a consistent talking-head format where the couple interacts and shares news directly with the audience.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 female main character and 1 male partner with a blurred face.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: The woman has long black hair, wears a light blue ribbed top, and has vibrant makeup with red lipstick; the man wears a plain beige crewneck t-shirt.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A simple indoor setting with a beige couch and a white wall featuring a framed painting with warm colors.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Linear: Hook -> Announcement -> Contextual Discussion -> Series Introduction
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as a formal announcement for the couple's upcoming wedding. It aims to share their excitement with their audience and establish a new content series (ep.0) that will document their wedding preparation journey, including rings, photos, and planning hurdles.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Blurred partner face (common in certain influencer niches), use of MBTI personality labels (J/P).
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video relies heavily on the personality of the female creator to drive engagement, using text overlays to emphasize emotional beats.
